title: mimulus kelloggii
intro: Mimulus kelloggii, also known as the Kellogg's monkey flower, is a species of flowering plant in the phrymaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Mimulus kelloggii include its ability to alleviate anxiety and stress, promote relaxation, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Mimulus kelloggii can be found in teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to promote emotional well-being and reduce symptoms of anxiety and depression.
